title: AWS From Zero to Production
description: A comprehensive AWS series covering fundamentals (IAM, VPC, EC2, S3) through production-grade architecture, monitoring, and CI/CD — designed for developers transitioning from theory to real-world AWS deployments.
author: Abhishek-sinha

title: Playwright with Java - Zero to Automation
description: A hands-on series that takes complete beginners from writing their first test to building a full AI-assisted automation framework using Playwright and Java. No prior testing experience needed.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Postman API Automation Mastery
description: A complete roadmap to mastering API testing with Postman. Learn everything from basic workspace organization to advanced CI/CD integration, schema validation, and data-driven testing using Newman.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Mastering the MyCodeYatra Mock API Server
description: A comprehensive 14-part guide designed for QA Engineers and Developers to simulate real-world backend scenarios.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Java RestAssured API Testing
description: Master API Test Automation using Java, RestAssured, TestNG, and Allure.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Mastering NodeJS API Testing with SuperTest
description: A complete 16-part masterclass on building enterprise-grade API test automation frameworks using SuperTest, Jest, and TypeScript.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: BDD API Testing with Karate DSL
description: A comprehensive 10-part series covering everything from basic BDD Gherkin syntax to advanced Karate Gatling performance testing and CI/CD pipelines.

title: Docker Zero to Production
description: A beginner-friendly series that walks you through Docker Desktop, Docker Hub, and writing production-ready docker-compose.yml files for dev, staging, and production environments.
author: Abhishek-sinha

title: Kafka Event-Driven Testing Masterclass
description: A comprehensive 15-part series covering everything from basic async message validation to schema registries, consumer lag monitoring, and CI/CD pipelines.

title: Selenium with Java - Zero to Automation
description: Master UI automation testing using Selenium WebDriver and Java.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Framework Design & Patterns in Java
description: Learn advanced design patterns, utility structures, logging, dependency injection, and framework design using Selenium with Java.

title: Selenium & API Hybrid Framework
description: Learn how to build a highly scalable, blazing fast Enterprise Hybrid Test Framework by seamlessly merging Selenium WebDriver UI Automation with RestAssured API Testing.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Advanced Authentication Mastery
description: Master complex authentication flows in Selenium, from cookie management and session handling to modern SSO and MFA architectures.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Advanced Security Testing
description: Shift-left your security testing by integrating OWASP ZAP, CSP validation, and Security Header checks directly into your Selenium Java automation framework.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Advanced Visual Testing
description: Ensure pixel-perfect UIs across all devices. Learn to integrate open-source tools like AShot and AI-driven platforms like Applitools Eyes and Percy into your Java automation framework.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Advanced Accessibility Testing
description: Ensure your web applications are usable by everyone. Learn to automate WCAG compliance checks, integrate Axe-Core, and test for keyboard navigation and screen reader support.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Python: Foundations
description: Master the absolute basics of Selenium WebDriver with Python. Learn how to set up your environment, manage web elements, and write your first robust tests using the powerful pytest framework.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Python - Core UI Automation
description: Dive deep into complex UI interactions. Learn advanced element location, wait strategies, window handling, and Shadow DOM manipulation with Selenium Python.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Python: Test Design & Architecture
description: Master advanced UI automation design patterns including Page Object Model, Data-Driven Testing, and custom Framework architecture in Python.

title: Selenium Python: Enterprise Framework
description: Learn how to build a scalable, enterprise-grade Selenium Python framework from scratch including custom utilities, configuration managers, and logging.

title: Python API Testing with Requests
description: Master backend automation in Python using the powerful Requests library. Learn how to validate JSON, handle OAuth, build data-driven suites, and integrate API testing with your Selenium framework.

title: Python Authentication & Security in Selenium
description: Master advanced security and authentication workflows! Learn how to manipulate browser cookies, bypass complex Single Sign-On (SSO) gateways, automate Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), and secure your Python Selenium framework.

title: Selenium Python Security
description: Learn how to automate DevSecOps, validate HTTP headers, parse CSPs, and integrate OWASP ZAP with Selenium.

title: Selenium Python Visual Testing
description: Learn how to detect CSS regressions and broken UI elements using pixel matching algorithms and AI visual testing tools.

title: Selenium Python CI/CD Pipelines
description: Learn how to build enterprise DevSecOps pipelines using GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Docker Grids, and Allure reporting for your Python automation framework.
